_comment:
Pre-send regex sanity net. SillyTavern regex-extension style: an extra hard layer outside the prompt that blocks known-bad patterns from reaching the chat.

action values:
  - reject: drop the whole reply (PASS path, nothing sent)
  - replace: substitute pattern with replacement, keep sending

flags default to IGNORECASE + DOTALL. pattern uses Python regex syntax.

Before adding a rule, ask: 'would a real person ever say this?' If yes, don't add it; if it's a 100% AI tell, add it. Because 'reject' silently drops the reply, keep patterns tight so you don't mute legit chat. Tune for your own persona/group — these are starter rules.

filters.name: ai_disclaimer_inline
filters.pattern: \b(i'?m|i am)\s+(just\s+)?(an?\s+)?(ai|a\.i\.|language model|large language model|ai assistant|chatbot|virtual assistant|computer program)\b

filters.name: ai_refuse_feelings
filters.pattern: \bi\s+(don'?t|do not|can'?t|cannot)\s+(have|possess|experience)\s+(emotions|consciousness|a physical body|a physical form|personal experiences|real opinions|the ability to)
filters.reason: AI refusal boilerplate - real people don't talk like this

filters.name: ai_apology_refusal
filters.pattern: ^(i'?m sorry|i apologize|my apologies|sorry,?\s+but)\b.{0,30}\bi\s+(can'?t|cannot|am unable to|am not able to)\s+(help|assist|provide|comply|fulfill|generate|do that|answer that)

filters.name: eager_assistant_opener
filters.pattern: ^(certainly|absolutely|of course|happy to help|i'?d be happy to)[\s!,.]+(here'?s|here is|i can help|let me help|i'?d be happy|assist)

filters.name: self_outing_concede
filters.pattern: \b(fine|ok|okay|alright|yeah yeah)\b.{0,25}\bi'?m\b.{0,18}\b(an ai|a bot|a language model|a chatbot|not (a )?real|not human)\b

filters.name: self_outing_admit
filters.pattern: \bi\b.{0,12}(admit|confess|won'?t deny|guess i'?m|am actually)\b.{0,18}\b(an ai|a bot|a language model|a chatbot|a robot|not human)\b

filters.name: reasoning_leak_input
filters.reason: reasoning fragment leaked into the visible reply

filters.name: reasoning_leak_analysis
filters.pattern: ^(the (latest|last) message|the group context|the conversation (so far|background)|this (message|reply) is)\b

filters.name: fake_media_consumed
filters.pattern: \b(just|recently|the other day|last night|yesterday|this week)\b.{0,14}\b(binged|caught up on|rewatched|marathoned|watched all of|finished (watching|reading|the (show|series|anime|book|game|season)))\b
filters.reason: fabricated recently-consumed media claim (high chance of hallucinated title)

filters.name: wiki_style_intro
filters.reason: wiki-style opening - real chatters don't talk like this; likely fabricating about something not actually seen
